tables: Bihar BPSC Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept. Govt. of Bihar Recruitment 2026 Exam Pre Answer Key

Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar. Examination 2026. Those Candidates Are Enrolled to the Following BPSC Auditor Vacancy Can Download Exam Pre Answer Key. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Auditor Recruitment 2026.
Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) BPSC Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar. Recruitment 2026 BPSC Auditor Advt No. : 09/2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 05/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 26/02/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 26/02/2026 Exam Date : 05/07/2026 Admit Card Available : 28/06/2026 Answer Key Available : 13/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC/ Other State : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female Candidate (Bihar Dom.) : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

BPSC Auditor Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/08/2025 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 37 Years for Male Maximum Age : 40 Years for Female Read the Notification for Age Relaxation in BPSC Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar.  Recruitment 2026.
Bihar BPSC Auditor Exam 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 102 Post
Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar.

A : Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar.

How to Fill BPSC Auditor Online Form 2026 Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar. Recruitment Notification 2026 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC Bihar Auditor Jobs 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 05/02/2026 to 26/02/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Auditor under Panchayati Raj Dept., Govt. of Bihar.  Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – ID, DOB Proof, Etc. Live Photo and Hindi / English Signature Required in BPSC SST Form 2025. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full BPSC Auditor 2026 Notification Before Apply Online.
